---
title: "Publish {{dataset_name}} to EDI"
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Overview

Publish **{{dataset_name}}** to the Environmental Data Initiative (EDI) as an EML data package.

- **Source ingest**: `{{source_ingest}}`
- **Portal**: EDI (https://portal.edirepository.org)
- **Format**: EML + CSV data tables

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

devtools::load_all(here::here("../calcofi4db"))
devtools::load_all(here::here("../calcofi4r"))
librarian::shelf(
  CalCOFI/calcofi4db,
  CalCOFI/calcofi4r,
  DBI, dplyr, DT, EML, fs, glue,
  here, lubridate, readr, stringr,
  tibble, tidyr,
  quiet = T)
options(readr.show_col_types = F)

# output paths
dataset  <- "{{dataset}}"
dir_edi  <- here(glue("data/edi/{dataset}"))
dir_create(dir_edi)
```

## Load Source Data

```{r}
#| label: load-data

# load from release parquet
con <- get_duckdb_con(":memory:")
load_prior_tables(
  con,
  parquet_dir = here("data/parquet/{{source_ingest}}"),
  geom_tables = c("grid", "site"))

dbListTables(con)
```

## Prepare Data Tables

```{r}
#| label: TODO-prepare-data

# TODO: extract and format data tables for EDI distribution
# - clean column names (no special characters)
# - UTF-8 encoding
# - dates in ISO 8601 format
# - missing values as empty strings or NA

# d_table1 <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT ... FROM ...")
# d_table2 <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT ... FROM ...")

# write_csv(d_table1, path(dir_edi, "{{dataset}}_data.csv"))
# write_csv(d_table2, path(dir_edi, "{{dataset}}_stations.csv"))
```

## Build EML Metadata

```{r}
#| label: TODO-eml

# TODO: build EML metadata using the EML R package
# reference: https://docs.ropensci.org/EML/

# define people ----
# creator <- eml$creator(
#   individualName = eml$individualName(
#     givenName = "...",
#     surName   = "..."),
#   organizationName = "CalCOFI",
#   electronicMailAddress = "...")

# contact <- eml$contact(
#   individualName = eml$individualName(
#     givenName = "...",
#     surName   = "..."),
#   organizationName = "CalCOFI",
#   electronicMailAddress = "calcofi@ucsd.edu")

# define coverage ----
# geographic <- eml$geographicCoverage(
#   geographicDescription = "CalCOFI sampling grid, Southern California Current System",
#   boundingCoordinates = eml$boundingCoordinates(
#     westBoundingCoordinate  = -135,
#     eastBoundingCoordinate  = -117,
#     northBoundingCoordinate = 51,
#     southBoundingCoordinate = 23))

# temporal <- eml$temporalCoverage(
#   rangeOfDates = eml$rangeOfDates(
#     beginDate = eml$beginDate(calendarDate = "..."),
#     endDate   = eml$endDate(calendarDate = "...")))

# taxonomic <- eml$taxonomicCoverage(
#   taxonomicClassification = list(
#     eml$taxonomicClassification(
#       taxonRankName  = "Kingdom",
#       taxonRankValue = "Animalia",
#       taxonomicClassification = list(...)
#     )
#   ))

# define data table attributes ----
# attributes_table1 <- data.frame(
#   attributeName        = c("column1", "column2", ...),
#   attributeDefinition  = c("description1", "description2", ...),
#   measurementScale     = c("ratio", "nominal", ...),
#   domain               = c("numericDomain", "textDomain", ...),
#   unit                 = c("meter", NA, ...),
#   numberType           = c("real", NA, ...),
#   definition           = c(NA, "text definition", ...),
#   formatString         = c(NA, NA, ...),
#   stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
# )

# build data table ----
# dataTable1 <- eml$dataTable(
#   entityName        = "{{dataset}}_data.csv",
#   entityDescription = "...",
#   physical = eml$physical(
#     objectName     = "{{dataset}}_data.csv",
#     size           = file_size(path(dir_edi, "{{dataset}}_data.csv")),
#     dataFormat     = eml$dataFormat(
#       textFormat = eml$textFormat(
#         numHeaderLines = 1,
#         recordDelimiter = "\\n",
#         attributeOrientation = "column",
#         simpleDelimited = eml$simpleDelimited(fieldDelimiter = ",")))),
#   attributeList = eml$attributeList(attribute = attributes_table1))

# assemble EML ----
# eml_doc <- eml$eml(
#   packageId = "edi.xxx.1",
#   system    = "https://pasta.lternet.edu",
#   dataset   = eml$dataset(
#     title    = "{{dataset_name}}",
#     creator  = creator,
#     contact  = contact,
#     abstract = eml$abstract(para = "..."),
#     keywordSet = eml$keywordSet(keyword = c("CalCOFI", "{{dataset}}", "oceanography")),
#     coverage = eml$coverage(
#       geographicCoverage = geographic,
#       temporalCoverage   = temporal,
#       taxonomicCoverage  = taxonomic),
#     methods  = eml$methods(
#       methodStep = eml$methodStep(
#         description = eml$description(para = "..."))),
#     dataTable = list(dataTable1),
#     intellectualRights = eml$intellectualRights(
#       para = "This data package is released under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0)."
#     )
#   ))
```

## Validate EML

```{r}
#| label: TODO-validate-eml

# eml_validate(eml_doc)
# write_eml(eml_doc, path(dir_edi, "eml.xml"))
```

## Create Data Package

```{r}
#| label: TODO-package

# zip_path <- path(dir_edi, glue("{dataset}_edi_package.zip"))
# zip_files <- list.files(dir_edi, pattern = "\\.(csv|xml)$")
# withr::with_dir(dir_edi, zip(zip_path, zip_files))
# cat("EDI package created:", zip_path, "\n")
```

## Upload to EDI Staging (Optional)

```{r}
#| label: TODO-upload-edi

# TODO: upload to EDI staging environment via API
# requires EDI credentials
#
# librarian::shelf(EDIutils, quiet = T)
# login()
# create_data_package(
#   eml      = path(dir_edi, "eml.xml"),
#   env      = "staging",
#   user_id  = "...",
#   user_key = "...")
```

## Upload to GCS

```{r}
#| label: upload-gcs

# sync_to_gcs(dir_edi, glue("publish/{dataset}_edi"))
```

## Cleanup

```{r}
#| label: cleanup

dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```
